title: Common carriers
doc_html:
§307.6.  Common carriers

Common carriers are exempted from the licensing provisions of this Section, but are required to comply with R.S. 56:307.7 below.  

Acts 1986, No. 904, §1.  

{{NOTE:  SEE ACTS 1986, NO. 904, §5.}}
